title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged out but opted into data-sharing
scenario: Analytics events continue to be gathered after logout when Share Data toggle is enabled in App Settings > General > Account
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → App Settings (gear icon) → General → Account.
3. Ensure the user is logged out of their account.
4. Locate the 'Share Data' toggle under Account settings and verify it is enabled (ON).
6. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
7. Trigger a device-related event, such as adding the device (device_added event with device serial number).
8. Open Firebase Analytics console and check the event count for 'device_added' with the corresponding device serial number.
expected: When the user is logged out but has opted into data-sharing via App Settings > General > Account > Share Data toggle, analytics events (e.g., device_added with device serial number) should NOT be gathered or sent to Firebase. Event counts should remain unchanged.
